overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city during a rainy afternoon. The player crosses wet intersections and walks along neon-lit streets lined with towering glass skyscrapers, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and futuristic vehicles in a high-fidelity game engine environment.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection with towering neon-lit skyscrapers and an elevated highway structure overhead. The camera walks across a wet crosswalk with yellow stripes, passing a pedestrian with a red umbrella, then turns right onto a sidewalk beside a large red building.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a distinctive red building covered in graffiti. The camera follows pedestrians with umbrellas past parked futuristic vehicles and tall palm trees, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a cluttered construction zone with orange barriers and trash bags lining the sidewalk. The camera approaches a busy intersection, waits with a crowd of pedestrians holding umbrellas, then crosses the wet street as futuristic vehicles pass by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk district, moving from a towering neon intersection into a gritty urban corridor and finally toward a bustling construction zone. It begins by crossing a wet, yellow-striped crosswalk beneath an elevated highway, passing a pedestrian with a red umbrella before turning right along a sidewalk. As the camera proceeds, the environment shifts to a stretch of wet concrete beside a graffiti-covered red building, where palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles line the path under the glow of distant skyscrapers. The scene then transitions into a cluttered construction area marked by orange barriers and trash bags, leading the camera toward a crowded street corner. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera joins a group of umbrella-carrying pedestrians to cross a busy intersection amidst the flow of futuristic traffic.
